scripts.ready: pnpm run build && pnpm run check && pnpm run test
scripts.dev:storybook: concurrently -n compiler,generate,frameworks,app "pnpm run dev:storybook:compiler" "pnpm run dev:storybook:generate" "pnpm run dev:storybook:frameworks" "pnpm run dev:storybook:app"
scripts.dev:storybook:frameworks: concurrently -n react,vue,svelte,solid,angular,qwik,astro "pnpm run dev:storybook:react" "pnpm run dev:storybook:vue" "pnpm run dev:storybook:svelte" "pnpm run dev:storybook:solid" "pnpm run dev:storybook:angular" "pnpm run dev:storybook:qwik" "pnpm run dev:storybook:astro"
scripts.dev:storybook:app: wait-on tcp:6006 tcp:6007 tcp:6008 tcp:6009 tcp:6010 tcp:6011 tcp:6012 && pnpm --filter @inkline/storybook-app storybook
